message:
fix(cmd): replace os.Exit() calls with SilentExitError to allow deferred cleanup

os.Exit() in cobra RunE handlers bypasses deferred cleanup functions (file
handles, lock releases, temp files). Replace with return NewSilentExit(code)
which propagates through cobra to the single os.Exit in main.go, allowing
all defers to run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
